title: Exposure: Expanded
description: Addon for Exposure that adds new lenses, filters and films.
body:
A companion mod for [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) that adds things that make the mod feel more complete.
### Telescopic & Panoramic Lens
![Telescopic lens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb757b2dc53999d832b532e542cde49c47769ae5_0.webp)![Panoramic lens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40347126a285bb32870b52e31776a1c893b6389e_0.webp)

Craftable from a spyglass and amethyst, the Telescopic Lens lets you zoom in even further, and the Panoramic Lens lets you zoom out to capture a greater area.
### Vanity Films
![Gameboy Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/657b235a4721dbb7349140755e9bbe9c70675f84_0.webp)
![NES Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4e837bba986be5ae84631bd11a18737ed816f6d_0.webp)
![Commodore 64 Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a89a0915822717816c2d620bfb92efb87cdea33_0.webp)
![CGA Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/840cadca9db1ef90e534be217fb98209488dfb9c_0.webp)

Gameboy, NES, Commodore 64 and CGA color palette films found in village chests or craftable just like any other film.
### High Capacity & High Resolution Films
![High Capacity Color Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d60845ddd701a6b8addb2f7f10daccb7fa25ce7_0.webp)
![High-Resolution Color Film](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad503ff44a79242be81731542f3afa47b5a73f9f_0.webp)

Films with doubled capacity for photos, as well as ones with doubled resolution of photos. They work in any camera like normal films. Available both in color and black & white.
### Vanity Filters

16 different fancy camera filters based on Super Secret Settings shaders, found in various different structures in chests.
### [Exposure Polaroid](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure-polaroid) Integration
![Instant Gameboy Slide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78945a5f8249652bec64d5be853b481d791d448d_0.webp)
![Instant High-Resolution Color Slide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/646d8dd1324497db6c6df6bb1818e8047b47d126_0.webp)

Vanity slides and high-resolution slides are both available and work with any Instant Camera if Exposure Polaroid is installed.

Visit the [wiki](https://github.com/Sparkwave2/exposure-expanded/wiki) for more info, or join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/abWNXyudA5) to ask questions or suggest things.
